# panelType()

**Instance Method**

Returns the style of the candidates window.

## Declaration

```swift
func panelType() -> IMKCandidatePanelType
```

## Return Value

A [doc://com.apple.inputmethodkit/documentation/InputMethodKit/IMKCandidatePanelType] constant that represents the style of the candidates window.

## Managing Window Type and Text Attributes

- **setPanelType(_:)**: Sets the style of the candidates window.
- **setAttributes(_:)**: Sets the style attributes for the candidates window.
- **attributes()**: Returns a dictionary of the style attributes used for the candidates window..
